caption: A frantic tabby in a full safety harness is desperately trying to scale a vertical glass skyscraper to deliver a tiny, trembling pizza to a lonely office worker below, screaming 'I've GOT THIS!' while slipping on the sleek surface! 🍕🏢😱 #CatHero #PizzaDelivery #WallClimbing #FelineChaos #UrbanLegend #InstaCat
